details.longDescription: Seth Arnott is not your typical undergraduate student. Gifted and bored, he uses his computer skills and an uncanny understanding of the telephone network to unleash pranks across campus and town. Together with his good friend Gabriel and newcomer Kerstin, Seth's gags escalate as they take over movie theater phone systems and wireless connections at coffee shops. When the trio accidentally listen in on the work of a computer criminal during one of their escapades, they decide to blog about it on their website. Within a day of encountering the criminal, the pranksters find themselves at the focus of a police investigation. They have been framed, somehow, for operating one of the world's largest networks of infected computers. Confused, the three students barely avoid arrest and flee underground in an attempt to piece together the events and hopefully prove their innocence. What follows is an exciting journey through the world of cyber-crime.

details.longDescription: When a series of linked murders forces GalCop to outlaw the shadow market, one pilot follows the truth into deep space. The further she travels, the more she realizes the conspiracy reaches well beyond human space.
An abandoned station wakes up with a message no one was supposed to hear. A salvage crew follows the signal and learns why the station had to stay silent.
A bright coastline hides a long memory and one impossible reunion. As summer crowds roll in, old wounds rise with the tide.
An experimental treatment unlocks strange memories that should not exist. Each recovered detail points to a different life and a dangerous research program.
A silent city and a missing astronomer become the same mystery. The clues point skyward, but every answer disappears by dawn.
Three siblings inherit a candy factory that behaves like a time machine. Every recipe opens a different year, and not all of them are safe to revisit.
A red sea and one drifting satellite mark the start of a final mission. A crew with no backup has to decide what gets saved and what gets left behind.
